---
title: "Kevin Mansfield PhD FSLL"
pagetitle: "Kevin Mansfield PhD FSLL"
subtitle: "Associate Professor, UCL Institute of Environmental Design and Engineering"
image: img/church.png

about:
  template: solana
  id: about-block
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/mansfieldkp
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://masto.ai/@kpmansfield/ 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/kpmansfield
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kevin-mansfield-5b4693a3/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:kevin.mansfield@ucl.ac.uk"  
Page-layout: full
---

<span>&emsp;</span>



##### <span style="color:red">&#x1F6A7; Note: This website is currently under (rather <em>slow</em>) construction [26th May 2026] . . .</span>
